input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36/reviews" --jq '.[] | select(.user.type != "Bot") | {user: .user.login, state: .state, body: .body}'
REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/issues/36/comments" --jq '.[] | {user: .user.login, type: .user.type, body: .body}'
REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36" --jq '{state: .state, review_comments: .review_comments, comments: .comments}'

No changes needed — the PR has no actionable review feedback.
